name: elizaos-plugin-cook4fun
description: ElizaOS plugin to launch and trade coins on cook4.fun (Robinhood chain, chainId 4663).

COOK4FUN_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Agent wallet private key (0x-prefixed) holding ETH on the Robinhood chain. Used to sign launch/buy/sell transactions.

COOK4FUN_RPC_URL.description: JSON-RPC endpoint for the Robinhood chain. Defaults to the public mainnet RPC.

COOK4FUN_LAUNCHPAD_ADDRESS.description: Launchpad contract address. Defaults to the live V2 launchpad.

COOK4FUN_SLIPPAGE_BPS.description: Default slippage tolerance in basis points for buys/sells (e.g. 1000 = 10%). Defaults to 1000.
